label: OPC-UA Collection Example
info:
OPC-UA multi-tag subscription. Changes are published to Tier0 UNS.

Update cfg-opcua-ep.endpoint to the real server address.
Update the nodeId list in fn-build-items.
Update the topicMap mapping in fn-to-uns.

name: Subscription tag list
OPC-UA to UNS mapping
OPC-UA multi-tag subscription to Tier0 UNS
info:
## Architecture
inject(once) -> fn(tag list) -> OpcUa-Client(subscribe) -> fn(map to UNS) -> mqtt out

## Required edits
1. cfg-opcua-ep: set endpoint to the real OPC-UA server address.
2. fn-build-items: replace nodeId values with the real subscription tags.
3. fn-to-uns: update topicMap with the real nodeId to UNS path and field mappings.
4. cfg-mqtt-tier0: in real deployments, replace this example node with the backend-created Tier0 mqtt-broker config from flow data.

## Output format
MQTT topic = UNS path, for example Plant/Line1/Metric/Temperature.
MQTT payload = JSON string, for example {"temperature": 27.5}.
